name: AI 'Not a Bubble (Just Yet)' Call-Spread Basket
thesis: The AI infrastructure buildout persists through the option window ('not a bubble just yet'), expressed as defined-risk long-dated call verticals across the supply chain — compute (AMD, MRVL), neocloud/GPU landlords (NBIS, IREN, WULF, HUT, CIFR), optics/photonics (COHR, TSEM), power (BE, VICR) — with long strikes near the money so a +10-20% grind still pays, and short strikes at evidence-supported analyst-target zones rather than slogan doubles. ~$21.3k planned (~5.7% of portfolio), median breakeven +9%, max payouts at +20% to +95% moves.
invalidation: The 'not a bubble yet' premise failing inside the window: hyperscaler capex guidance cuts, contracted-backlog cancellations, funding-quality cracks spreading (Meta-style 'excess compute' resale becoming widespread), or the basket compounding below roughly +5-8%/yr through the 2027-28 expiries. Tripwires: IREN Horizon-1 handoff (Q3 2026), CIFR AWS rent commencement (Aug 2026), hyperscaler 2027 capex guides (Oct 2026 - Jan 2027), 2027 HBM contract pricing.

legs.label: AMD Dec-28 560/700
legs.thesis_note: Long leg near ATM; short 700 at the Goldman ~$640-target zone; both legs OI 600+ — most liquid structure in the book

legs.label: COHR Dec-27 320/390
legs.thesis_note: Max payout at consensus target ($387); +5.6% breakeven; long leg liquid (OI 218), short leg thin — patient limit

legs.label: IREN Sep-28 40/80
legs.thesis_note: Street mean target is the double; long leg lowered 50->40 cuts BE from +34% to +14%; 26 months runway; dilution treadmill is the drag

legs.label: NBIS Dec-28 220/330
legs.thesis_note: Short pulled back from 440 to street-high territory (max pays at +50%); revenue contracted (~$46B MSFT/Meta) but dilution + Meta-Compute two-sidedness cap conviction

legs.label: WULF Jun-28 22/32
legs.thesis_note: $12.8B signed Fluidstack/Google-backstopped contracts, pre-funded; short strike below the +76% mean target; most liquid new-name chain

legs.label: BE Jun-28 240/330
legs.thesis_note: $20B converting backlog (Oracle/Nebius/Brookfield); max payout at just +35%; only power name with real long-dated liquidity

legs.label: MRVL Jun-28 240/290
legs.thesis_note: Target +7%; short strike right on it — smallest, most-likely win; FY27 +40% guided, Maia ramp

legs.label: HUT Jun-28 105/130
legs.thesis_note: $16.8B contracted (River Bend/Beacon Point, Google/Anthropic-backstopped); strikes chosen inside the chain's only liquid band (105-160)

legs.label: CIFR Jun-28 22/32
legs.thesis_note: Restruck per the Romero reconciliation: max at +45% = his and the street's target; half-size until AWS rent commences (Aug 2026)

legs.label: TSEM Jan-28 220/310
legs.thesis_note: Consensus +41%, signed $1.3B SiPho contracts w/ prepayments — but a dead chain: bid-and-forget at theo-mid; a non-fill is acceptable

legs.label: VICR Jan-28 270/400
legs.thesis_note: Cleanest small-cap fundamentals (mean +49%, 6up/0dn); theo-only chain: bid-and-forget at theo-mid; a non-fill is acceptable
